name: Bourbon-Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, pumpkin, 3/4 cup sugar, half-and-half, 3 tablespoons bourbon, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into the pie shell. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
3. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 45 minutes or until set. Set aside to cool.
4. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine butter and 1/4 cup brown sugar. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
5. Add pecans and 2 tablespoons bourbon to the pan. Stir to coat.
6. Spoon the mixture over the pie.
7. Heat the remaining bourbon in a saucepan just long enough to produce fumes (do not boil). Turn off heat, ignite, and pour over pie.
8. Serve pie when flames die down.
